Name:Fire
ManaCost:1 R
Types:Instant
A:SP$ DealDamage | ValidTgts$ Creature,Player | TgtPrompt$ Select any target | NumDmg$ 2 | DivideEvenly$ True | SpellDescription$ Fire deals 2 damage divided as you choose among one or two targets.
AlternateMode:Split
Oracle:Fire deals 2 damage divided as you choose among one or two targets.

ALTERNATE

Name:Ice
ManaCost:1 U
Types:Instant
A:SP$ Tap | ValidTgts$ Permanent | TgtPrompt$ Select target permanent | SpellDescription$ Tap target permanent.
A:SP$ Draw | NumCards$ 1 | SpellDescription$ Draw a card.
Oracle:Tap target permanent.\nDraw a card.
